texto: On Prozac, Sisyphus might well push the boulder back up the mountain with more enthusiasm and creativity. I do not want to deny the benefits of psychoactive medication. I just want to point out that Sisyphus is not a patient with a mental health problem. To see him as a patient with a mental health problem is to ignore certain larger aspects of his predicament connected to boulders, mountains, and eternity.
explicacao: Citação de Carl Elliott sobre temas ligados a saude mental. “On Prozac, Sisyphus might well push the boulder back up the mountain with more enthusiasm and cre…” articula saude-mental, depression, psychiatry em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como psychiatry e psychology.
